productDisplayName: Woodland Men Olive Green Casual Shoes
description: High-top styling on the classic suede shoe, this woodland ankle boot is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Aggressive outsole with lugs, plush textured upper, D-ring eyelets and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorial dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo t-shirt.UpperLeather upper with strategically placed overlaysFour-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyeletsPadded tonguePull loop at the heelPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper on the toe box and heel collar for maximum comfortShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
